themes: Manager-heavy backlog with urgent follow-up needed: Nearly all contacts are Managers focused on day-to-day location workflows and reporting efficiency, with a long tail of requests exceeding 100–300+ days waiting, signaling a systemic gap in Product's engagement cadence.

Repeat accounts signal unresolved pain: Several accounts—including Travel Leaders Group, Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices, Holiday Inn Express, Anytime Fitness, Ford, Avenue5 Residential, and 29th Street Living—appear multiple times, suggesting persistent unmet needs that warrant consolidated discovery and prioritized roadmap attention.

Industry clusters point to multi-location management and reporting as core themes: Contacts span franchises, multifamily residential, hospitality, fitness, and automotive verticals, but share a common need around managing locations at scale, saving time on recurring tasks, and getting more actionable insights from SOCi reporting.
